chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No. 333 of 2021 ______________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge. 1. For order on office objection / reply at “A” 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.2534/2021 11-12-2023 Mr. Faizan Hussain Memon, advocate for the appellant Mr. Yousuf Makda, advocate for respondent No.7 Mr. Sandeep Malani, AAG ----------- Learned counsel for the appellant submits that the suit that was filed is in relation of time bound octroi contract and since the contract is concluded in terms of its time, this appeal has become infructuous and hence dismissed as being infructuous. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad
